name: Macadamia Butterballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sugar, stirring continuously until well combined.
3. Slowly incorporate the flour, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Stir in the chopped macadamia nuts and chocolate chips.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract.
6. Refrigerate the dough for at least 3 hours or overnight.
7. Scoop the dough by teaspoonfuls and roll into balls.
8. Place the cookie balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 15-18 minutes, or until set but not browned.
10. Allow cookies to cool slightly before rolling in confectioners sugar.
11. Optionally, color the dough with a few drops of cake coloring if desired.
Makes approximately 5 dozen small cookies.
